description:
This dashboard shows the performance and health of Azure Virtual Machines via different metrics collected by Azure Monitor VM Insights. Filter data by Resource Group.
This will serve as a health checks ad basic metric overview.

panels.description:
This panel displays the environment context for the dashboard view.
It shows the selected Azure subscription, resource groups, datasource, and time range currently applied to all panels.

Changing the subscription or resource group variables will update all metrics and counts displayed in the dashboard.
panels.title: Client Information

panels.description:
Shows the total number of Azure resources detected in the selected subscription and resource group.

This panel provides a quick inventory size indicator for the monitored client environment.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId =~ '$sub'
| where resourceGroup =~ '$rg'
| summarize count()

panels.title: Resources Monitored

panels.description:
Displays the number of core service workloads deployed in the selected subscription and resource group.

Unlike the total resource count, this panel filters for primary service components 

This helps operators quickly understand how many application or infrastructure services are actively deployed in the client environment.

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where type in~ (
    'microsoft.web/sites',
    'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines',
    'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters',
    'microsoft.sql/servers/databases',
    'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts'
)
| summarize ServiceCount = count()

panels.title: Services Monitored

panels.description:
Displays the number of active critical alerts (Sev0 and Sev1) in the selected subscription. A non-zero value indicates immediate issues that require investigation.

Purpose: 
Provides an immediate indicator of high-severity problems affecting the environment.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Fired"
| where tostring(properties.essentials.severity) in ("Sev0","Sev1")
| summarize CriticalAlerts = count()

panels.title: Critical Alerts

panels.description:
Shows the number of active warning-level alerts (Sev2–Sev4). These alerts indicate potential issues or degraded conditions that may require attention.

Purpose: 
Highlights lower-severity operational concerns before they escalate.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Fired"
| where tostring(properties.essentials.severity) in ("Sev2","Sev3","Sev4")
| summarize WarningAlerts = dcount(id)

panels.title: Warning Alerts

panels.description:
Shows the number of machines that have reported telemetry recently through heartbeat signals.

Purpose: 
Confirms that monitored machines are actively sending data, indicating monitoring coverage is functioning.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| summarize MachinesReporting = dcount(Computer)

azureResourceGraph.query:
Heartbeat
| where _SubscriptionId in (${sub:singlequote})
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(15m)
| summarize MachinesReporting = dcount(Computer)

panels.title: Machines Reporting

panels.description:
Displays the time since the most recent heartbeat was received from any monitored machine.

Purpose: 
Indicates whether monitoring telemetry is current. Increasing values may suggest telemetry delays or disconnected agents.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated)
| extend MinutesSinceHeartbeat = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastHeartbeat)
| project MinutesSinceHeartbeat

panels.title: Heartbeat Freshness

panels.description: Displays currently firing alerts in the selected subscription. Use this table to quickly identify affected resources and begin investigation.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Fired"
| project
    Severity = tostring(properties.essentials.severity),
    AlertName = tostring(properties.essentials.alertRule),
    Resource = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResourceName),
    ResourceGroup = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResourceGroup),
    SignalType = tostring(properties.essentials.signalType),
    StartTime = todatetime(properties.essentials.startDateTime)
| order by StartTime desc

panels.title: $sub Active Alerts

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId == ${sub:singlequote}
| project
    ResourceName = name,
    ResourceType = type,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Region = location
| order by ResourceGroup asc

panels.description: Displays the number of resource groups in the selected subscription. This helps operators understand how the environment is logically organized.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
ResourceContainers
| where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups"
| where subscriptionId == ${sub:singlequote}
| summarize ResourceGroups = count()

azureResourceGraph.query:
ResourceContainers
| where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups"
| where subscriptionId == ${sub:singlequote}
| summarize ResourceGroups = count()

panels.title: Resource Groups

panels.description:
Shows the number of distinct Azure resource types deployed in the selected subscription.

Example interpretation:
Low number → simple environment (few services)

High number → complex environment with many Azure services
panels.title: Resource Types

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| summarize Heartbeats = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.description: Shows the volume of system events generated by monitored machines over time. Spikes may indicate failures, reboots, or other system activity.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Event
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: System Event Volume

panels.description:
Shows infrastructure metric ingestion activity over time, confirming that performance metrics are being collected consistently.

One thing to be aware of though: not all environments populate InsightsMetrics depending on the monitoring agent configuration. If you see no data, that is usually why.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
InsightsMetrics
| summarize Metrics = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

azureResourceGraph.query:
InsightsMetrics
| summarize Metrics = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Metric Activity

panels.description: Shows average CPU utilization across monitored machines over time.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: CPU Utilization

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize MaxCPU = max(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.description: The resource path for this panel uses multiple template variables which requires modifying the dashboard JSON directly. If you would like to do something similar please go to Settings > Save As. Edit as you'd like in your new copy by going to Settings > JSON Model.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let trendBinSize = 5m;
let maxResultCount = 500;
let summaryPerComputer = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage')    
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId Average = avg(Val), Max = max(Val), percentiles(Val, 5, 10, 50, 90, 95) by ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| project ComputerId, Computer, Average, Max, P5th = percentile_Val_5, P10th = percentile_Val_10, P50th = percentile_Val_50, P90th = percentile_Val_90, P95th = percentile_Val_95, ResourceId = _ResourceId
| top 10 by ${agg:text};
let computerList = summaryPerComputer
| summarize by ComputerId, Computer;
let EmptyNodeIdentityAndProps = datatable(ComputerId: string, Computer:string, NodeId:string, NodeProps:dynamic, Priority: long) [];        
let OmsNodeIdentityAndProps = computerList        
| extend NodeId = ComputerId        
| extend Priority = 1        
| extend NodeProps = pack('type', 'StandAloneNode', 'name', Computer);        
let ServiceMapNodeIdentityAndProps = VMComputer        
| where TimeGenerated >= startDateTime        
| where TimeGenerated < endDateTime        
| extend ResourceId = strcat('machines/', Machine)         
| extend tempComputerId=iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId) 
| extend laResourceId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId),'',     replace(@'virtualmachinescalesets/(.+)/virtualmachines/(\\d+)',     @'virtualmachinescalesets/\\1/virtualmachines/\\1_\\2', _ResourceId))    
| extend oldLaResourceId=iff(isempty(_ResourceId),'',replace(@'virtualmachinescalesets/(.+)/virtualmachines/(\\d+)',@'virtualmachines/\\1_\\2', _ResourceId))        
| where tempComputerId in~ (computerList) or laResourceId in (computerList) or oldLaResourceId in (computerList) 
| extend ComputerId = iff(laResourceId in (computerList), laResourceId, iff(oldLaResourceId in (computerList), oldLaResourceId, tempComputerId))        
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Machine        
| extend                  AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity = iif(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceName),                      strcat(AzureCloudServiceInstanceId, '|', AzureCloudServiceDeployment), ''),                  AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity = iif(isnotempty(AzureVmScaleSetName),                      strcat(AzureVmScaleSetInstanceId, '|', AzureVmScaleSetDeployment), ''),                  ComputerProps =                      pack('type', 'StandAloneNode',                           'name', DisplayName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId,                           'subscriptionId', AzureSubscriptionId,                           'resourceGroup', AzureResourceGroup,                           'azureResourceId', _ResourceId),                  AzureCloudServiceNodeProps =                      pack('type', 'AzureCloudServiceNode',                           'cloudServiceInstanceId', AzureCloudServiceInstanceId,                           'cloudServiceRoleName', AzureCloudServiceRoleName,                           'cloudServiceDeploymentId', AzureCloudServiceDeployment,                           'fullDisplayName', FullDisplayName,                           'cloudServiceName', AzureCloudServiceName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId),                  AzureScaleSetNodeProps =                       pack('type', 'AzureScaleSetNode',                           'scaleSetInstanceId', AzureResourceName,                           'vmScaleSetDeploymentId', AzureVmScaleSetDeployment,                           'vmScaleSetName', AzureVmScaleSetName,                           'serviceFabricClusterName', AzureServiceFabricClusterName,                           'vmScaleSetResourceId', AzureVmScaleSetResourceId,                           'resourceGroupName', AzureResourceGroup,                           'subscriptionId', AzureSubscriptionId,                           'fullDisplayName', FullDisplayName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId)        
| project   ComputerId,                    Computer,                    NodeId = case(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity), AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity,                               isnotempty(AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity), AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity, Computer),                    NodeProps = case(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity), AzureCloudServiceNodeProps,                                  isnotempty(AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity), AzureScaleSetNodeProps, ComputerProps),                    Priority = 2;        let NodeIdentityAndProps = union kind=inner isfuzzy = true                                          EmptyNodeIdentityAndProps, OmsNodeIdentityAndProps, ServiceMapNodeIdentityAndProps                                    
| summarize arg_max(Priority, *) by ComputerId;let trend = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| where ComputerId in (computerList)
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId TrendValue = percentile(Val, 95) by ComputerId, Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, trendBinSize)
| project ComputerId, Computer
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId by ComputerId, Computer;
summaryPerComputer
| join ( trend ) on ComputerId
| join ( NodeIdentityAndProps ) on ComputerId
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "virtualmachinescalesets/" scaleSetName "/virtualmachines/" vmNameScale
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "virtualmachines/" vmName
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "resourcegroups/" resourceGroup "/providers/microsoft.compute/" typeVM "/" nameVM
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "microsoft.compute/" typeScale "/" nameScale "/virtualmachines" remaining
| project resourceGroup, Average, P50th, P90th, P95th, Max, Computer, Type = iff(isnotempty(typeScale), typeScale, typeVM), Name = iff(isnotempty(nameScale), nameScale, nameVM)

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

panels.title: CPU Utilization % Statistics

panels.description: Shows the percentage of committed memory in use over time. Higher values indicate increasing memory pressure and possible risk of memory exhaustion.
panels.title: Memory Usage

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Avg. Disk sec/Transfer"
| summarize DiskLatencyMs = avg(CounterValue) * 1000 by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.description: Shows the average logical disk space utilization across monitored machines in the selected subscription. Values are calculated from the LogicalDisk "% Free Space" performance counter and converted to used percentage (100 minus free space). This provides a high-level view of overall disk capacity trends in the environment.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between ($__timeFrom .. $__timeTo)
| where _SubscriptionId == "$sub"
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize DiskUsedPct = avg(UsedPct) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Disk Space Usage

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let trendBinSize = 5m;
let maxResultCount = 10;
let summaryPerComputer = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpaceMB')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| extend Tags = todynamic(Tags)
| extend Total = todouble(Tags['vm.azm.ms/diskSizeMB']), MountId = tostring(Tags['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Val = (100.0 - (Val * 100.0)/Total)
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId Average = avg(Val), Max = max(Val), percentiles(Val, 5, 10, 50, 90, 95) by MountId, ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| project MountId, ComputerId, Computer, Average, Max, P5th = percentile_Val_5, P10th = percentile_Val_10, P50th = percentile_Val_50, P90th = percentile_Val_90, P95th = percentile_Val_95, ResourceId = _ResourceId
| top 10 by ${agg:text};
let computerList = summaryPerComputer
| summarize by ComputerId, Computer;
let EmptyNodeIdentityAndProps = datatable(ComputerId: string, Computer:string, NodeId:string, NodeProps:dynamic, Priority: long) [];        
let OmsNodeIdentityAndProps = computerList        
| extend NodeId = ComputerId        
| extend Priority = 1        
| extend NodeProps = pack('type', 'StandAloneNode', 'name', Computer);        
let ServiceMapNodeIdentityAndProps = VMComputer        
| where TimeGenerated >= startDateTime        
| where TimeGenerated < endDateTime        
| extend ResourceId = strcat('machines/', Machine)         
| extend tempComputerId=iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId) 
| extend laResourceId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId),'',     replace(@'virtualmachinescalesets/(.+)/virtualmachines/(\\d+)',     @'virtualmachinescalesets/\\1/virtualmachines/\\1_\\2', _ResourceId))    
| extend oldLaResourceId=iff(isempty(_ResourceId),'',replace(@'virtualmachinescalesets/(.+)/virtualmachines/(\\d+)',@'virtualmachines/\\1_\\2', _ResourceId))        
| where tempComputerId in~ (computerList) or laResourceId in (computerList) or oldLaResourceId in (computerList) 
| extend ComputerId = iff(laResourceId in (computerList), laResourceId, iff(oldLaResourceId in (computerList), oldLaResourceId, tempComputerId))        
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Machine        
| extend                  AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity = iif(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceName),                      strcat(AzureCloudServiceInstanceId, '|', AzureCloudServiceDeployment), ''),                  AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity = iif(isnotempty(AzureVmScaleSetName),                      strcat(AzureVmScaleSetInstanceId, '|', AzureVmScaleSetDeployment), ''),                  ComputerProps =                      pack('type', 'StandAloneNode',                           'name', DisplayName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId,                           'subscriptionId', AzureSubscriptionId,                           'resourceGroup', AzureResourceGroup,                           'azureResourceId', _ResourceId),                  AzureCloudServiceNodeProps =                      pack('type', 'AzureCloudServiceNode',                           'cloudServiceInstanceId', AzureCloudServiceInstanceId,                           'cloudServiceRoleName', AzureCloudServiceRoleName,                           'cloudServiceDeploymentId', AzureCloudServiceDeployment,                           'fullDisplayName', FullDisplayName,                           'cloudServiceName', AzureCloudServiceName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId),                  AzureScaleSetNodeProps =                       pack('type', 'AzureScaleSetNode',                           'scaleSetInstanceId', AzureResourceName,                           'vmScaleSetDeploymentId', AzureVmScaleSetDeployment,                           'vmScaleSetName', AzureVmScaleSetName,                           'serviceFabricClusterName', AzureServiceFabricClusterName,                           'vmScaleSetResourceId', AzureVmScaleSetResourceId,                           'resourceGroupName', AzureResourceGroup,                           'subscriptionId', AzureSubscriptionId,                           'fullDisplayName', FullDisplayName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId)        
| project   ComputerId,                    Computer,                    NodeId = case(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity), AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity,                               isnotempty(AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity), AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity, Computer),                    NodeProps = case(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity), AzureCloudServiceNodeProps,                                  isnotempty(AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity), AzureScaleSetNodeProps, ComputerProps),                    Priority = 2;        
let NodeIdentityAndProps = union kind=inner isfuzzy = true                                          EmptyNodeIdentityAndProps, OmsNodeIdentityAndProps, ServiceMapNodeIdentityAndProps                                    
| summarize arg_max(Priority, *) by ComputerId;
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpaceMB')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| where ComputerId in (computerList)| extend Tags = todynamic(Tags)
| extend Total = todouble(Tags['vm.azm.ms/diskSizeMB']), MountId = tostring(Tags['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Val = (100.0 - (Val * 100.0)/Total)
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId TrendValue = max(Val) by MountId, ComputerId, Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, trendBinSize)

panels.title: Max vailable Logical Space Disk Used %

panels.description: The resource path for this panel uses multiple template variables which requires modifying the dashboard JSON directly. If you would like to do something similar please go to Settings > Save As. Edit as you'd like in your new copy by going to Settings > JSON Model.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let trendBinSize = 5m;
let maxResultCount = 10;
let summaryPerComputer = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpaceMB')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| extend Tags = todynamic(Tags)
| extend Total = todouble(Tags['vm.azm.ms/diskSizeMB']), MountId = tostring(Tags['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Val = (100.0 - (Val * 100.0)/Total)
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId Average = avg(Val), Max = max(Val), percentiles(Val, 5, 10, 50, 90, 95) by MountId, ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| project MountId, ComputerId, Computer, Average, Max, P5th = percentile_Val_5, P10th = percentile_Val_10, P50th = percentile_Val_50, P90th = percentile_Val_90, P95th = percentile_Val_95, ResourceId = _ResourceId
| top 10 by ${agg:text};
let computerList = summaryPerComputer
| summarize by ComputerId, Computer;
let EmptyNodeIdentityAndProps = datatable(ComputerId: string, Computer:string, NodeId:string, NodeProps:dynamic, Priority: long) [];        
let OmsNodeIdentityAndProps = computerList        
| extend NodeId = ComputerId        
| extend Priority = 1        
| extend NodeProps = pack('type', 'StandAloneNode', 'name', Computer);        
let ServiceMapNodeIdentityAndProps = VMComputer        
| where TimeGenerated >= startDateTime        
| where TimeGenerated < endDateTime        
| extend ResourceId = strcat('machines/', Machine)         
| extend tempComputerId=iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId) 
| extend laResourceId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId),'',     replace(@'virtualmachinescalesets/(.+)/virtualmachines/(\\d+)',     @'virtualmachinescalesets/\\1/virtualmachines/\\1_\\2', _ResourceId))    
| extend oldLaResourceId=iff(isempty(_ResourceId),'',replace(@'virtualmachinescalesets/(.+)/virtualmachines/(\\d+)',@'virtualmachines/\\1_\\2', _ResourceId))        
| where tempComputerId in~ (computerList) or laResourceId in (computerList) or oldLaResourceId in (computerList) 
| extend ComputerId = iff(laResourceId in (computerList), laResourceId, iff(oldLaResourceId in (computerList), oldLaResourceId, tempComputerId))        
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Machine        
| extend                  AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity = iif(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceName),                      strcat(AzureCloudServiceInstanceId, '|', AzureCloudServiceDeployment), ''),                  AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity = iif(isnotempty(AzureVmScaleSetName),                      strcat(AzureVmScaleSetInstanceId, '|', AzureVmScaleSetDeployment), ''),                  ComputerProps =                      pack('type', 'StandAloneNode',                           'name', DisplayName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId,                           'subscriptionId', AzureSubscriptionId,                           'resourceGroup', AzureResourceGroup,                           'azureResourceId', _ResourceId),                  AzureCloudServiceNodeProps =                      pack('type', 'AzureCloudServiceNode',                           'cloudServiceInstanceId', AzureCloudServiceInstanceId,                           'cloudServiceRoleName', AzureCloudServiceRoleName,                           'cloudServiceDeploymentId', AzureCloudServiceDeployment,                           'fullDisplayName', FullDisplayName,                           'cloudServiceName', AzureCloudServiceName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId),                  AzureScaleSetNodeProps =                       pack('type', 'AzureScaleSetNode',                           'scaleSetInstanceId', AzureResourceName,                           'vmScaleSetDeploymentId', AzureVmScaleSetDeployment,                           'vmScaleSetName', AzureVmScaleSetName,                           'serviceFabricClusterName', AzureServiceFabricClusterName,                           'vmScaleSetResourceId', AzureVmScaleSetResourceId,                           'resourceGroupName', AzureResourceGroup,                           'subscriptionId', AzureSubscriptionId,                           'fullDisplayName', FullDisplayName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId)        
| project   ComputerId,                    Computer,                    NodeId = case(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity), AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity,                               isnotempty(AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity), AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity, Computer),                    NodeProps = case(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity), AzureCloudServiceNodeProps,                                  isnotempty(AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity), AzureScaleSetNodeProps, ComputerProps),                    Priority = 2;        
let NodeIdentityAndProps = union kind=inner isfuzzy = true                                          EmptyNodeIdentityAndProps, OmsNodeIdentityAndProps, ServiceMapNodeIdentityAndProps                                    
| summarize arg_max(Priority, *) by ComputerId;
let trend = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpaceMB')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| where ComputerId in (computerList)| extend Tags = todynamic(Tags)
| extend Total = todouble(Tags['vm.azm.ms/diskSizeMB']), MountId = tostring(Tags['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Val = (100.0 - (Val * 100.0)/Total)
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId TrendValue = percentile(Val, 95) by MountId, ComputerId, Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, trendBinSize)
| project MountId, ComputerId, Computer
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId by MountId, ComputerId, Computer;summaryPerComputer
| join kind=leftouter ( trend ) on ComputerId, MountId
| join kind=leftouter ( NodeIdentityAndProps ) on ComputerId
| extend VolumeId = strcat(MountId, '|', NodeId), VolumeProps = pack('type', 'NodeVolume', 'volumeName', MountId, 'node', NodeProps)
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "virtualmachinescalesets/" scaleSetName "/virtualmachines/" vmNameScale
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "virtualmachines/" vmName
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "resourcegroups/" resourceGroup "/providers/microsoft.compute/" typeVM "/" nameVM
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "microsoft.compute/" typeScale "/" nameScale "/virtualmachines" remaining
| project resourceGroup, Average, P50th, P90th, P95th, Max, Computer, Type = iff(isnotempty(typeScale), typeScale, typeVM), Name = iff(isnotempty(nameScale), nameScale, nameVM)

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

panels.title: Available Logical Space Disk Used % Statistics

panels.description: Shows the average network traffic throughput across monitored machines over time. Spikes may indicate heavy workload activity or increased network usage.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Bytes Total/sec"
| summarize NetworkMBps = avg(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024 by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Network Throughput

panels.description: The resource path for this panel uses multiple template variables which requires modifying the dashboard JSON directly. If you would like to do something similar please go to Settings > Save As. Edit as you'd like in your new copy by going to Settings > JSON Model.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let trendBinSize = 5m;
let maxResultCount = 10;
let summaryPerComputer = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'Network' and Name == 'WriteBytesPerSecond')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| summarize Val = sum(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId Average = avg(Val), Max = max(Val), percentiles(Val, 5, 10, 50, 90, 95) by ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| project ComputerId, Computer, Average, Max, P5th = percentile_Val_5, P10th = percentile_Val_10, P50th = percentile_Val_50, P90th = percentile_Val_90, P95th = percentile_Val_95, ResourceId = _ResourceId
| top 10 by ${agg:text};
let computerList = summaryPerComputer
| summarize by ComputerId, Computer;
let EmptyNodeIdentityAndProps = datatable(ComputerId: string, Computer:string, NodeId:string, NodeProps:dynamic, Priority: long) [];        
let OmsNodeIdentityAndProps = computerList        
| extend NodeId = ComputerId        
| extend Priority = 1        
| extend NodeProps = pack('type', 'StandAloneNode', 'name', Computer);        
let ServiceMapNodeIdentityAndProps = VMComputer        
| where TimeGenerated >= startDateTime        
| where TimeGenerated < endDateTime        
| extend ResourceId = strcat('machines/', Machine)         
| extend tempComputerId=iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId) 
| extend laResourceId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId),'',     replace(@'virtualmachinescalesets/(.+)/virtualmachines/(\\d+)',     @'virtualmachinescalesets/\\1/virtualmachines/\\1_\\2', _ResourceId))    
| extend oldLaResourceId=iff(isempty(_ResourceId),'',replace(@'virtualmachinescalesets/(.+)/virtualmachines/(\\d+)',@'virtualmachines/\\1_\\2', _ResourceId))        
| where tempComputerId in~ (computerList) or laResourceId in (computerList) or oldLaResourceId in (computerList) 
| extend ComputerId = iff(laResourceId in (computerList), laResourceId, iff(oldLaResourceId in (computerList), oldLaResourceId, tempComputerId))        
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Machine        
| extend                  AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity = iif(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceName),                      strcat(AzureCloudServiceInstanceId, '|', AzureCloudServiceDeployment), ''),                  AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity = iif(isnotempty(AzureVmScaleSetName),                      strcat(AzureVmScaleSetInstanceId, '|', AzureVmScaleSetDeployment), ''),                  ComputerProps =                      pack('type', 'StandAloneNode',                           'name', DisplayName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId,                           'subscriptionId', AzureSubscriptionId,                           'resourceGroup', AzureResourceGroup,                           'azureResourceId', _ResourceId),                  AzureCloudServiceNodeProps =                      pack('type', 'AzureCloudServiceNode',                           'cloudServiceInstanceId', AzureCloudServiceInstanceId,                           'cloudServiceRoleName', AzureCloudServiceRoleName,                           'cloudServiceDeploymentId', AzureCloudServiceDeployment,                           'fullDisplayName', FullDisplayName,                           'cloudServiceName', AzureCloudServiceName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId),                  AzureScaleSetNodeProps =                       pack('type', 'AzureScaleSetNode',                           'scaleSetInstanceId', AzureResourceName,                           'vmScaleSetDeploymentId', AzureVmScaleSetDeployment,                           'vmScaleSetName', AzureVmScaleSetName,                           'serviceFabricClusterName', AzureServiceFabricClusterName,                           'vmScaleSetResourceId', AzureVmScaleSetResourceId,                           'resourceGroupName', AzureResourceGroup,                           'subscriptionId', AzureSubscriptionId,                           'fullDisplayName', FullDisplayName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId)        
| project   ComputerId,                    Computer,                    NodeId = case(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity), AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity,                               isnotempty(AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity), AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity, Computer),                    NodeProps = case(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity), AzureCloudServiceNodeProps,                                  isnotempty(AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity), AzureScaleSetNodeProps, ComputerProps),                    Priority = 2;        
let NodeIdentityAndProps = union kind=inner isfuzzy = true                                          EmptyNodeIdentityAndProps, OmsNodeIdentityAndProps, ServiceMapNodeIdentityAndProps                                    
| summarize arg_max(Priority, *) by ComputerId;
let trend = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'Network' and Name == 'WriteBytesPerSecond')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| where ComputerId in (computerList)
| summarize Val = sum(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId TrendValue = percentile(Val, 95) by ComputerId, Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, trendBinSize)
| project ComputerId, Computer
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId by ComputerId, Computer;
summaryPerComputer
| join ( trend ) on ComputerId
| join ( NodeIdentityAndProps ) on ComputerId
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "virtualmachinescalesets/" scaleSetName "/virtualmachines/" vmNameScale
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "virtualmachines/" vmName
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "resourcegroups/" resourceGroup "/providers/microsoft.compute/" typeVM "/" nameVM
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "microsoft.compute/" typeScale "/" nameScale "/virtualmachines" remaining
| project resourceGroup, Average, P50th, P90th, P95th, Max, Computer, Type = iff(isnotempty(typeScale), typeScale, typeVM), Name = iff(isnotempty(nameScale), nameScale, nameVM)

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

panels.title: Available Bytes Sent Statistics

panels.description: The resource path for this panel uses multiple template variables which requires modifying the dashboard JSON directly. If you would like to do something similar please go to Settings > Save As. Edit as you'd like in your new copy by going to Settings > JSON Model.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let trendBinSize = 5m;
let maxResultCount = 10;
let summaryPerComputer = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime) 
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'Network' and Name == 'ReadBytesPerSecond')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| summarize Val = sum(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId Average = avg(Val), Max = max(Val), percentiles(Val, 5, 10, 50, 90, 95) by ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| project ComputerId, Computer, Average, Max, P5th = percentile_Val_5, P10th = percentile_Val_10, P50th = percentile_Val_50, P90th = percentile_Val_90, P95th = percentile_Val_95, ResourceId = _ResourceId
| top 10 by ${agg:text};
let computerList = summaryPerComputer
| summarize by ComputerId, Computer;
let EmptyNodeIdentityAndProps = datatable(ComputerId: string, Computer:string, NodeId:string, NodeProps:dynamic, Priority: long) [];        
let OmsNodeIdentityAndProps = computerList        
| extend NodeId = ComputerId        
| extend Priority = 1        
| extend NodeProps = pack('type', 'StandAloneNode', 'name', Computer);        
let ServiceMapNodeIdentityAndProps = VMComputer        
| where TimeGenerated >= startDateTime        
| where TimeGenerated < endDateTime        
| extend ResourceId = strcat('machines/', Machine)         
| extend tempComputerId=iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId) 
| extend laResourceId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId),'',     replace(@'virtualmachinescalesets/(.+)/virtualmachines/(\\d+)',     @'virtualmachinescalesets/\\1/virtualmachines/\\1_\\2', _ResourceId))    
| extend oldLaResourceId=iff(isempty(_ResourceId),'',replace(@'virtualmachinescalesets/(.+)/virtualmachines/(\\d+)',@'virtualmachines/\\1_\\2', _ResourceId))        
| where tempComputerId in~ (computerList) or laResourceId in (computerList) or oldLaResourceId in (computerList) 
| extend ComputerId = iff(laResourceId in (computerList), laResourceId, iff(oldLaResourceId in (computerList), oldLaResourceId, tempComputerId))        
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Machine        
| extend                  AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity = iif(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceName),                      strcat(AzureCloudServiceInstanceId, '|', AzureCloudServiceDeployment), ''),                  AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity = iif(isnotempty(AzureVmScaleSetName),                      strcat(AzureVmScaleSetInstanceId, '|', AzureVmScaleSetDeployment), ''),                  ComputerProps =                      pack('type', 'StandAloneNode',                           'name', DisplayName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId,                           'subscriptionId', AzureSubscriptionId,                           'resourceGroup', AzureResourceGroup,                           'azureResourceId', _ResourceId),                  AzureCloudServiceNodeProps =                      pack('type', 'AzureCloudServiceNode',                           'cloudServiceInstanceId', AzureCloudServiceInstanceId,                           'cloudServiceRoleName', AzureCloudServiceRoleName,                           'cloudServiceDeploymentId', AzureCloudServiceDeployment,                           'fullDisplayName', FullDisplayName,                           'cloudServiceName', AzureCloudServiceName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId),                  AzureScaleSetNodeProps =                       pack('type', 'AzureScaleSetNode',                           'scaleSetInstanceId', AzureResourceName,                           'vmScaleSetDeploymentId', AzureVmScaleSetDeployment,                           'vmScaleSetName', AzureVmScaleSetName,                           'serviceFabricClusterName', AzureServiceFabricClusterName,                           'vmScaleSetResourceId', AzureVmScaleSetResourceId,                           'resourceGroupName', AzureResourceGroup,                           'subscriptionId', AzureSubscriptionId,                           'fullDisplayName', FullDisplayName,                           'mappingResourceId', ResourceId)        
| project   ComputerId,                    Computer,                    NodeId = case(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity), AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity,                               isnotempty(AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity), AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity, Computer),                    NodeProps = case(isnotempty(AzureCloudServiceNodeIdentity), AzureCloudServiceNodeProps,                                  isnotempty(AzureScaleSetNodeIdentity), AzureScaleSetNodeProps, ComputerProps),                    Priority = 2;        
let NodeIdentityAndProps = union kind=inner isfuzzy = true                                          EmptyNodeIdentityAndProps, OmsNodeIdentityAndProps, ServiceMapNodeIdentityAndProps                                    
| summarize arg_max(Priority, *) by ComputerId;
let trend = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'Network' and Name == 'ReadBytesPerSecond')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| where ComputerId in (computerList)
| summarize Val = sum(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId TrendValue = percentile(Val, 95) by ComputerId, Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, trendBinSize)
| project ComputerId, Computer
| summarize hint.shufflekey = ComputerId by ComputerId, Computer;summaryPerComputer
| join ( trend ) on ComputerId
| join ( NodeIdentityAndProps ) on ComputerId
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "virtualmachinescalesets/" scaleSetName "/virtualmachines/" vmNameScale
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "virtualmachines/" vmName
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "resourcegroups/" resourceGroup "/providers/microsoft.compute/" typeVM "/" nameVM
| parse tolower(ResourceId) with * "microsoft.compute/" typeScale "/" nameScale "/virtualmachines" remaining
| project resourceGroup, Average, P50th, P90th, P95th, Max, Computer, Type = iff(isnotempty(typeScale), typeScale, typeVM), Name = iff(isnotempty(nameScale), nameScale, nameVM)

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

list.label: Aggregate
list.name: agg
list.query: Average : score = round(avg(Val)\, 2), P5th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 5)\, 2),  P10th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 10)\, 2), P50th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 50)\, 2), P80th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 80)\, 2), P90th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 90)\, 2), P95th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 95)\, 2)

InsightsMetrics
| project TenantId
